notes:
On a hardware capable of Vulkan 1.3, use Proton Expermental then it should work...
On a hardware capable of Vulkan 1.1, then use Proton CachyOS with PROTON_DXVK_SAREK=1 %command% (You're warned that using dxvk sarek well cause ban in multiplayer games, not single player games...)
Used Proton CachyOS
Used the iGPU by adding "DRI_PRIME=0"(use gpu 0),
My gpu does not support Vulkan so I enabled wined3d ("PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1"), not needed for newer hardware...
Used DirectX11 ("-dx11") for compatibility, you don't need to if you got a newer hardware...
At last the main menu showed up glitchy in my computer cause of opengl and older hardware I got and it was pretty slow and unplayable...
I used Wayland too ("PROTON_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1")...
